case_title: AMY GUERIN ET AL VS. HYUNDAI MOTOR AMERICA ET AL

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFFS AMY GUERIN AND JOHN GUERIN'S MOTION AND MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT IS DENIED. (SEE MINI-MINUTES FOR FULL DETAILS) NO PROPOSED ORDER RECEIVED. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PROVIDE AND FOLLOW THE COURT'S ORDER. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE COURT'S RULING AND MUST DROP A HARD COURTESY COPY IN DEPT. 302'S INBOX. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)
